title: Autocomplete
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Autocomplete primitive preserving model-owned input value, open state, highlighted item, list and inline modes, input-owned form value, popup/listbox ARIA, empty state, disabled/read-only states, deterministic placement attributes, and Combobox-backed filtering, collection, highlight, and selection behavior.

registry.reason: Autocomplete is a value-specialized primitive over the local Combobox collection, filtering, popup, listbox, highlighted-item, item, trigger, clear, and focus-command conventions.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and runtime-facing test helpers for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema and predicate helpers for serializable options and event payloads.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Autocomplete primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Autocomplete primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Input value, open state, highlighted item, and inline completion display are model-owned inputs and interactions emit typed facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow and keeps autocomplete state in the consuming model.

deviations.summary: Autocomplete delegates collection, filtering, highlighted-item navigation, popup/listbox attributes, item selection, clear behavior, and focus commands to the local Combobox primitive.
deviations.rationale: The Base UI origin is implemented on top of Combobox internals, and the local registry keeps the same architecture instead of forking the behavior engine.

deviations.summary: Placement is represented through deterministic side, align, offset, collision, positioner, and popup attributes without DOM measurement or collision flipping.
deviations.rationale: Measured collision behavior belongs behind a shared measurement service, not an ad hoc Autocomplete render helper side effect.

deviations.summary: Filtering is represented as a pure local label/textValue contains match over model-owned query text, with inline/static modes disabling filtering through Combobox's filter input.
deviations.rationale: The local primitive preserves the origin filtering contract without importing React hooks or hiding query state outside the Foldkit model.
